org.docgene.model

Class XMLMoreInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLReference
      • org.docgene.model.AbstractMoreInfoRef
        • org.docgene.model.XMLMoreInfo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ArticleReference, ElementReference, ParagraphArticleReference, ParagraphElement, StyledElement

    public class XMLMoreInfo
extends AbstractMoreInfoRef
    Represent a "moreInfo" reference which is present in a "Main Article" tag.
    See Also:
    XMLSeeArticle

      • Fields inherited from class org.docgene.model.XMLReference
